a:r.a:t: INCIDENT
MANAGEMENT
End user logs ticket via Help Desk, email, or phone — Incident, Service Request, or Enhancement
L1 picks up, prioritizes, categorizes, and assigns to L1/L2/L3 based on SOPs
P1 triggers immediate escalation procedure; L1 attempts first call resolution via SOP
If unresolved, assigned to L2 SME for investigation; engineering team leveraged if needed
Ticket updated throughout; once resolved, final notes added and closure documented
Continuous improvement tracked via IMMI audit process
PROBLEM
MANAGEMENT
Problem tickets created for recurring incidents or as P1 RCA sub-tasks
Recurring incidents and P1s reviewed to compile problem ticket with full evidence
Priority set by criticality and frequency; correctly assigned to Infra, App, 3rd Party, or Cloud team
Problem investigated and diagnosed; progress reviewed in weekly status meetings
Solution identified; Change Management invoked if fix requires a release
Resolution documented in Known Error DB; problem ticket closed
CHANGE
MANAGEMENT
All fixes (Code, Enhancement, Config, Project) require an RFC once tested in non-prod
RFC details discussed in CAB meeting; PRs verified as part of Change Management process
Change ticket logged, typed, and linked to originating Incident/Problem/Enhancement tickets
Change tickets routed for approval per formal Change Management Policy
Changes migrated to production post-CAB approval
SERVICE
ACCEPTANCE
Structured handover (Functional, Technical, QA) from Dev to Support before Go-Live
PO/BA defines objectives, User Stories & Acceptance Criteria; UI/UX shares screens & mocks
Architect/Tech Lead provides architecture & code walkthrough; DevOps shares branching strategy
QA Lead covers test case coverage, automation tools & open defects; Support QA validates KPIs
PM shares environments, 3rd parties & monitoring alerts; SLAs activate post 2–3 week warranty
PEAK EVENT
MANAGEMENT
Peak event calendar updated with name, dates, duration, stakeholders & expected volumes
Performance & load tests conducted; infrastructure certified and scaled before event start
Teams war room channel created; Helpdesk sends regular system health updates during event
Escalation paths pre-configured; real-time triaging through campaign war room
ITSM
pillars
